description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top for sensors and the front-facing camera. The back is finished in a dark blue color and displays a prominent, centered Apple logo, along with a triple-lens camera array and flash in the upper left corner. The sides are thin and metallic, with visible buttons for volume and power. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium, glossy appearance. Its compact size and smooth surfaces make it suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, dark blue Apple smartphone with a large front display, triple rear cameras, and a metallic frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge display with a dark abstract wallpaper and a small notch at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slim metallic edge and the slight protrusion of the rear camera bump.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the dark blue finish, centered Apple logo, and triple camera array in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thin metallic edge and camera bump.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, clearly visible against the dark blue surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a dark, abstract wallpaper with blue concentric arcs and circles, with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array with three lenses and a flash, arranged in a triangular pattern in the upper left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the sides: a power button on the right edge and volume buttons on the left edge.
